content.text: Please implement the feature described in the brief.
I will start by reading the brief and then delegating to a subagent.

input.prompt: Read the brief and implement the posthoc parser.

content.text: Good progress. Can you now write the spec?

input.contents:
# Spec

## Purpose

This slice initialises the parser.

content.text: Looks good. Now write the plan.
The plan has been written. Let me refine the spec.

input.new_string: This slice initialises the post-hoc parser.

content.text: All done. The implementation is complete.
